antiPatterns_§14: no axe / no chainsaw / no power saws / no aggressive tools
no readable text fakery (Cyrillic prefer abstract glyphs)

params.topic: 4-в-1 в обслуживании участка — арбористика, крыши, мусор, демонтаж
params.visualConcept: high-angle aerial view of a Moscow Region private suburban property at midday, showing four distinct visual elements distributed across the lot: a clean dump truck parked at the gate, a mature tree in the foreground, a private house with a pitched metal roof in the middle ground, an old wooden shed at the back of the lot, mature trees and wooden fences around, calm matter-of-fact composition

items.alt: Подмосковный участок с четырьмя направлениями работ — деревья, крыша, мусор и старый сарай — на одной территории

params.topic: Можно ли спилить дерево на своём участке — что говорит закон
params.visualConcept: still-life on a wooden outdoor table at the foot of a mature deciduous tree on a private property, on the table a folded paper document tied with string suggesting an official permit, a metal measuring tape and a pencil next to it, soft morning light filtered through leaves, depth of field on the document with the tree trunk slightly out of focus

items.alt: Документ-разрешение на столе под старой берёзой на частном участке — нужно ли разрешение на спил

params.topic: Штраф за спил дерева без разрешения — суммы и как избежать
params.visualConcept: still-life on a dark wooden table indoors: an open hard-cover document folder with abstract horizontal lines suggesting a regulation text (no readable letters, only line glyphs), a freshly cut tree stump cross-section placed next to it as a visual rhyme, a small wooden judge gavel on the corner of the table, neutral grey wall in the background, dramatic side light from a window

items.alt: Документ КоАП и пень дерева на столе — штраф за спил без разрешения

params.topic: Где получить разрешение на спил дерева в Московской области
params.visualConcept: exterior shot — a mature birch tree standing in the foreground on a quiet suburban property edge, a clipboard with a paper application form attached to its side resting against the tree trunk, a low-rise municipal-style brick administrative building blurred in the background across the road, overcast soft daylight, calm matter-of-fact composition

items.alt: Берёза с заявлением на спил на фоне административного здания МО — где получить порубочный билет

params.topic: Смета за 10 минут по фото — как Обиход считает стоимость
params.visualConcept: minimal overhead still-life on a clean light beige wooden office table: a modern smartphone lying flat on the left with its screen out of focus and showing a faint photo of a private property, a small lined paper notepad in the centre with thin blank horizontal lines (no letters, no numbers, no symbols, no glyphs, just blank ruled lines), a slim black ballpoint pen between them resting on the notepad, soft natural daylight from above, muted warm-grey palette. Editorial flat-lay composition with breathing space

items.alt: Смартфон с фото объекта и блокнот со сметой на офисном столе — расчёт стоимости за 10 минут
